title: StoryUnit
description: Shared contract for the Story -> Video -> Post-Activities content unit, consumed by kathai-chithiram and pramana. The three stages (story, video, activities) are generated/rendered independently and each carries its own provenance and governance. Apps MAY persist this verbatim (kathai: story_unit.json on disk; pramana: ContentDraft.body JSONB) or project it onto native models.

contract_version.description: Bump on any breaking change to this schema. Independent of the LLM/video integration versions in provenance.

unit_id.description: Stable id for the unit (UUID). kathai story_id / pramana ContentDraft.id map here.

app.description: Owning application. Open enum -- add portfolio apps as they adopt.

audience.description: Free-text audience note, e.g. 'special-needs child, age 4-8' or 'corporate employee, SOX in-scope'.

story.description: Stage 1: the source narrative + the structured scene breakdown that bridges into the video brief.

text.description: Present when kind=free-text. May be a pseudonymized placeholder (see privacy).

ref.description: Present when kind=reference, e.g. a clause path 'docs/frameworks/framework_sox.md#section-404'.

sensitivity.description: kathai source story is HIGH (parent-authored, about a child).

scenes.description: Ordered beats. This is the SHARED bridge: each scene becomes one shot in video.brief.shots and (optionally) one comprehension target in an activity.

caption.description: Accessibility caption; MUST match narration when present.

id.description: Stable character id; ties to a video.brief.ingredients entry for cross-scene identity consistency.

citations.description: Grounding sources (pramana: every quiz/lesson clause). Empty for kathai.

safety.description: Content-safety envelope. kathai enforces these before render.

video.description: Stage 2: the generated/rendered video. provider is pluggable -- 'veo' for AI generation, 'deterministic-renderer' for kathai's matplotlib/blender safety path.

id.description: Resolved via the wegofwd-video package registry (wegofwd_video/registry.py). 'veo' is the default verified AI generator.

byok.description: Bring-your-own-key, matching the wegofwd-llm registry policy.

spec.description: Generation parameters. One place to pin model + seed so re-runs are reproducible.

model.description: e.g. 'veo-3.1'. Never hardcoded in app code -- resolved from the registry.

seed.description: Pin for reproducibility. Required once a unit is APPROVED so re-renders stay on-model.

audio.description: Native synced audio (Veo 3.1). kathai uses gentle narration + low SFX.

output.description: The produced asset + tamper-evidence. asset_ref is a storage-agnostic pointer (pramana: S3 key on CourseVersion.video_asset_id; kathai: media/<file> on disk).

c2pa_signed.description: AI-generated provenance signature (Veo emits Google C2PA + SynthID).

review.description: Per-stage human gate. kathai REQUIRES this until automated safety is proven.

activities.description: Stage 3: ordered post-video activities. Polymorphic on `type`. pramana uses scored `quiz`; kathai uses `feedback-checkin` (engagement primitives, unscored).

provenance.description: One record per generated stage. Mirrors wegofwd_llm.provenance() so generation can be audited and stale content detected/regenerated.

governance.description: Lifecycle. pramana: approval state machine; kathai: human-review gate. Both forbid self-approval of one's own generation.

status.description: kathai uses the DRAFT/IN_REVIEW/APPROVED subset; pramana uses the full machine + PUBLISHED snapshot immutability.

privacy.description: Required where source sensitivity is HIGH (kathai). Enforces pseudonymization + provider data guarantees BEFORE any external dispatch.

tokens.description: token -> real value held ONLY at render time, never persisted in the unit. e.g. {"CHILD": "<runtime>"}.

provider_guarantees.description: Hard preconditions: dispatch is refused unless both hold.

residual_identifier_check.description: Hard-stop scan for leaked identifiers before dispatch.

videoBrief.description: The structured Veo-3.1 prompt (see veo_video_brief.template.md). Built FROM story.scenes. global_* fields hold continuity; per-shot fields hold the beat. ingredients lock identity across shots.

global_style.description: Look/mood applied to every shot, e.g. 'warm 2D storybook, soft flat color, calm'.

global_negative.description: What to avoid in every shot, e.g. 'no flashing, no text artifacts, no fast cuts, no scary imagery'.

audio_direction.description: Global audio intent, e.g. 'gentle female narrator, slow pace, soft ambient room tone, no music'.

ingredients.description: Up to 4 reference images for identity/setting consistency (Veo 3.1 Ingredients-to-Video). Each ties to a story character id or a fixed setting.

role.description: What this reference pins: a character id, 'setting', or 'style'.

ref.description: Asset pointer to the reference image.

shots.description: One shot per story scene (scene_index links them). Order = scene order.

prompt.description: Subject + action + setting, assembled from the scene.

dialogue.description: Spoken line (drives native audio). Usually = scene.narration.

negative.description: Per-shot overrides on top of global_negative.

goal_id.description: Ties the activity to a learning/therapy goal (kathai M1 primitive).

payload.description: Type-specific body. Validators select the matching shape by `type`.

scene_index.description: Optional link to the story scene this checks.

primitives.description: kathai M1 quantifiable feedback. Captured per child, minimized, keyed to goal_id.
